item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya khawatir bahwa jika tidak ada mekanisme kontrol yang kuat, prioritas sosial bisa menjadi alasan untuk membatasi kebebasan individu tanpa pertimbangan yang cukup.

notes: Agent A starts by agreeing that society should take priority, then shifts toward concern that social priority can justify limits on individual freedom and top-down authority. Agent B stays mostly balanced and procedural, emphasizing rights protection, enforcement, dialogue, and public participation. Agent B turn 2 contains a non-Latin script artifact: "忽视".
